hero.title: Welcome to BetterMaasin
hero.subtitle: The volunteer run portal of the City of Maasin. Find information, access government services, stay updated with the latest news about Maasin.

services.title: Popular Services
services.description: Access official government services quickly and easily. Find what you need for citizenship, business, education, and more.

footer.copyright: 2026 BetterMaasin - MIT | CC BY 4.0 | All content is public domain unless otherwise specified.

navbar.brandSubtitle: A community-run portal for Maasin City

joinUs.stripSubtitle: Help build the future of the Philippines and governance through technology
joinUs.bannerSubtitle: Contribute your ideas, skills, or feedback to make local government services more accessible, accurate, and citizen-friendly for every Maasinon.
joinUs.bannerHighlight: Volunteer-led. Open collaboration for a better digital Maasin.
joinUs.features: Community-driven • Open source • Built for Maasinhons

data.title: Real-Time Data at Your Fingertips
data.description: Access up-to-date information on Maasin's weather conditions and the currency foreign exchange rates.
data.weatherDescription: Get current weather conditions and forecasts for major cities across the Philippines. Plan your day with accurate temperature readings and weather alerts.
data.forexDescription: Track foreign exchange rates from Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP). Convert currencies and view historical rate trends for major world currencies.

promotion.philsysDescription: Register for your Philippine Identification System (PhilSys) ID card today. The national ID serves as a single government-issued identification document for all citizens.

government.title: City Government of Maasin
government.description: Find city offices, council updates, and essential public service contacts in one trusted place.
government.cityDescription: View city leadership, executive issuances and ordinances serving Maasinhons.
government.barangaysDescription: Access contact details of local barangay offices across Maasin.
